name: Desperation Diet Dip
recipeIngredient: 3 large cloves of fresh garlic, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Season with salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning to taste.
3. Transfer the mixture into the cottage cheese container.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least an hour, preferably overnight.
5. At party time, serve either in the cottage cheese container or in a serving bowl.
6. Sprinkle paprika on top for color before serving.
